title: Momonosuke Becomes Shogun
description: On pages 15–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Coby, Unknown person #15, Kaido as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is he trying to burn down the whole town?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since you're so hell-bent on playing hardball, have it your way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'LL SKEVER YOU AND YOUR WANNABE KAIDO ROUTINE FROM MOUTH TO TAIL!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Boss! Don't just go all out with your Haki like that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All the newbies are foaming at the mouth!

dialogue.speaker: Coby
dialogue.text: I won't call you Marines cowardly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: or under- handed for this, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...wouldn't you agree it's bad form to go after these worn out saplings...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...When they're exhausted from making pirate history?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I get it already! It's not like I want to pick a fight...

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 24 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
